leadText: The Damp Rock (Japanese: しめったいわ Damp Rock) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It extends the duration of rain.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon holding this item creates rain with the moves Rain Dance or Max Geyser , or the Ability Drizzle , it lasts eight turns instead of five turns. (Prior to Generation VI , it has no effect on Drizzle, which creates rain with indefinite length in those games.) In the Generation VII games, if rain has its duration extended by the Damp Rock, the turn counter on the user interface for these effects will indicate that it lasts for 8 turns for the player whose Pokémon used the move, while it will display that it lasts for 5 turns for their opponent. After 5 turns of rain have passed, the user interface will display that it lasts for 8 turns for both players.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt A Pokémon hold item that extends the duration of the move Rain Dance used by the holder. HG SS B W B2 W2 A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Rain Dance used by the holder. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It extends the duration of the move Rain Dance when used by the holder. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder changes the weather to rain, the rain will persist for longer than usual.
